market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Consumers lost $2.1 billion to social media scams in 2025, FTC reports
articles.description: The agency reports that losses from social media scams have increased eightfold, and that social media scams resulted in higher losses than any other method scammers used to contact consumers.

articles.title: BitMine acquires 101,000 ETH despite $6.5B in unrealized losses
articles.description: The crypto treasury company continues to buy Ether and earn staking rewards, even as price swings leave billions in unrealized losses on its balance sheet.

articles.title: EU sanctions target Russian crypto exchanges, stablecoins and CBDC
articles.description: The European Commission made its move in response to Russia's increasing reliance on crypto transactions to circumvent sanctions amid the country's war on Ukraine.

articles.title: Bitcoin price slips under $77K as bulls battle for new 'macro-bullish shift'
articles.description: Bitcoin bulls struggled to maintain gains as the bull market support band became a key reclaim level to flip the BTC price trend.

articles.title: MARA Holdings targets bitcoin quantum threat and network resilience with new foundation
articles.description: Bitcoin's future is not guaranteed, said CEO Fred Thiel at the Bitcoin Conference in Las Vegas.

articles.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
articles.description: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft get more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

articles.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
articles.description: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

articles.title: Bitcoin pulls back to $76,600 as rising oil price and Iran risks stall the rally
articles.description: Short-term holder profit-taking is offsetting fresh demand from ETFs and Strategy, pointing to consolidation below $80,000, Bitfinex analysts said.

articles.title: Bernstein sees IREN pivoting from Bitcoin mining to $3.7B AI cloud business
articles.description: As Bitcoin miner IREN shifts toward AI cloud infrastructure, leveraging a Microsoft deal and GPU expansion, analysts expect mining revenue to decline over time.

articles.title: Curve founder pitches market-based fix for $700K bad debt in contrast to Aave bailout
articles.description: The plan allows trapped lenders to sell tokenized claims on deposits, offering buyers an option-like bet on CRV's recovery.

articles.title: Solana developers outline plan to protect network from quantum threats
articles.description: Two of the network’s core developer teams, Anza and Jump Crypto’s Firedancer, have landed on the same solution: a new type of digital signature called Falcon.

articles.title: Bitcoin is climbing on thin volume, leaving rally vulnerable to macro shock
articles.description: Low trading volume and a lack of conviction from big-money bettors could leave the bitcoin rally on shaky ground, said 10x Research head Markus Thielen.

articles.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
articles.description: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

articles.title: Cross-border B2B stablecoin payments to hit $5 trillion by 2035, says Juniper Research
articles.description: Juniper Research found that 85% of all stablecoin transaction value in 2035 will be driven by international business-to-business (B2B) payments.

articles.title: Fidelity Digital Assets says bitcoin is leading crypto market stabilization
articles.description: Despite muted prices to start the second quarter, the report said improving onchain metrics and network activity point to a market finding its footing.

articles.title: Canada’s crypto donation ban clears key vote with support from Conservatives
articles.description: Bill C-25, the Strong and Free Elections Act, cleared second reading Friday and heads to committee as Conservative lawmakers raise but don’t challenge the proposed ban on bitcoin contributions

articles.title: As the bitcoin price rises, futures may look bearish, but they're not, analyst says
articles.description: Research firm 10x says the negative funding rates reflect structural hedging by institutions, not a broad bearish play.

articles.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy adds 3.2K Bitcoin at nearly $78K per BTC
articles.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy bought 3,273 Bitcoin for $255 million between April 20 and 26, bringing total holdings to 818,334 BTC.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Ethereum’s EEZ could pull other blockchains into its orbit
articles.description: The Ethereum Economic Zone aims to unify fragmented rollups, but its broader goal is to extend interoperability to other blockchains, says Ernst.
